commit.subject: LU-18308 test: big DIO read test
commit.message:
LU-18308 test: big DIO read test

Add test dio_pread to check big DIO read
For test purposes only

Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientdistro=el9.4 testlist=sanity env=ONLY="398t"
Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientdistro=sles15sp6 testlist=sanity env=ONLY="398t"
Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ifcfc9c11ab97ff053f2227da9f65c50d89df1f66
